name: kanban-board
title: KanbanBoard
description: A data-driven Kanban board — glass Surface columns with a header, status dot, ticket count, and a stack of small glass ticket cards. Cards rise + fade in on the house spring, staggered across the whole board so it assembles as one calm cascade.
pickWhen: a workflow / status board view — project management demo, AI agent task list. Use `bento-grid` for non-columnar overviews.
